link.title: Efuns
link.description: Built-in functions (efuns) the driver exposes to LPC code, grouped by topic and package.

link.title: Arrays
link.description: Create, allocate, filter, map, sort and search LPC arrays.

link.title: Async I/O
link.description: Non-blocking file and database I/O that returns results via callbacks.

link.title: Buffers
link.description: Allocate, read, write, transcode and checksum binary buffer data.

link.title: Function Calls & Call-Outs
link.description: Call functions on other objects, schedule call-outs, and manage shadows and exceptions.

link.title: Contrib Package
link.description: Optional add-on efuns from the contrib package: classes, strings, livings, memory and misc utilities.

link.title: Cryptography
link.description: Cryptographic hashing helpers.

link.title: Database
link.description: Connect to SQL databases and run queries, commits and rollbacks.

link.title: Line Editor (ed)
link.description: Drive the built-in ed line editor from LPC.

link.title: External Processes
link.description: Launch and communicate with external programs.

link.title: Foreign Function Interface
link.description: Load native libraries and call C functions, allocate memory and read/write structs.

link.title: Filesystem
link.description: Read, write, copy, move and inspect files and directories.

link.title: Floating-Point Math
link.description: Trigonometry, logarithms, powers, rounding and float conversions.

link.title: Function Pointers
link.description: Create, bind, defer and evaluate function pointers.

link.title: General
link.description: Miscellaneous efuns: vector and matrix math, compression, type predicates, save/restore and generic collection helpers.

link.title: Interactive & Networking
link.description: Player connections, input/output, snooping, telnet negotiation and terminal protocols (GMCP, MSDP, MXP, MSP, ZMP).

link.title: Driver Internals
link.description: Driver introspection, debugging, memory, tracing and runtime configuration.

link.title: JavaScript Bridge
link.description: Call into JavaScript from LPC on the WebAssembly build of the driver.

link.title: Mappings
link.description: Create, filter, iterate and transform LPC mappings (associative arrays).

link.title: Mudlib Support
link.description: User/euid identities, privileges, livings and author/domain statistics.

link.title: Numbers
link.description: Integer predicates, random-number generation and numeric conversion.

link.title: Objects
link.description: Clone, load, move, find and destruct objects and manage their inventory and state.

link.title: Command Parsing
link.description: The parse_command natural-language sentence, verb and rule parser.

link.title: Regular Expressions (PCRE)
link.description: Perl-compatible regular expression matching, extraction and replacement.

link.title: Sockets
link.description: Low-level TCP/UDP socket networking from the sockets package.

link.title: Strings
link.description: Manipulate, format, search, trim, encode and hash strings, plus bit-string operations.

link.title: System
link.description: Driver runtime services: time, eval-cost limits, inheritance introspection, call-out info and shutdown.

link.title: Applies
link.description: Driver-to-LPC callbacks (applies) that the FluffOS driver invokes on your objects, grouped by the interactive, master, and object roles they serve.

link.title: Object Applies
link.description: Lifecycle applies the driver calls on ordinary objects, such as create, reset, init, heart_beat, and clean_up.

link.title: Master Applies
link.description: Applies the driver calls on the master object to control security, permissions, UIDs, object loading, error handling, and mud-wide policy.

link.title: Interactive Applies
link.description: Applies the driver calls on interactive (player-connected) objects to handle input, output, prompts, and telnet/GMCP/MSDP/MXP protocol negotiation.

link.title: Standard Library
link.description: Pure-LPC helper functions and libraries shipped with the FluffOS testsuite mudlib (not driver efuns), organized by data type and domain.

link.title: Arrays
link.description: LPC helpers for transforming and aggregating arrays, such as reduce.

link.title: Database
link.description: A fluent LPC query builder for working with FluffOS-supported databases across SQLite, MySQL, and other backends.

link.title: Mappings
link.description: LPC helpers for working with mappings, such as weighted random selection of keys.

link.title: Numbers
link.description: LPC helpers for numeric aggregation and percentage math over ints and floats.

link.title: Objects
link.description: LPC helpers for locating and inspecting objects in inventories and environments.

link.title: Strings
link.description: LPC helpers for string manipulation, including base64 encoding, word wrapping, and bitmap-font rendering.

link.title: Concepts
link.description: Conceptual guides explaining how LPC, objects, and the FluffOS driver work together, for readers learning the platform rather than a specific function.

link.title: General Concepts
link.description: Foundational explanations of the LPC language, object model, the FluffOS driver, and mud-wide mechanisms like simul_efuns, hot reload, and networking.

link.title: Driver Internals
link.description: Configuration reference and implementation internals of the FluffOS driver, from runtime config flags to the VM, memory, and native extension layers.

link.title: Command-Line Tools
link.description: Reference for the driver binary and the companion command-line utilities shipped with FluffOS for compiling, inspecting, and converting LPC and save-file data.

link.title: 中文文档
link.description: FluffOS 的中文文档：efun 函数参考、apply 回调说明以及构建指南。

link.title: 构建指南
link.description: FluffOS 的中文构建指南。

link.title: Efun 函数
link.description: efun（外部函数）的中文参考。

link.title: Apply 回调
link.description: 驱动调用 LPC 对象的回调函数（apply）中文说明。

link.title: Object Apply
link.description: 普通对象生命周期相关的 apply 回调：create、reset、heart_beat、init 等。

link.title: Master Apply
link.description: master 对象的 apply 回调：权限校验、路径解析、错误处理等。

link.title: Interactive Apply
link.description: 交互式（玩家连接）对象的 apply 回调：logon、catch_tell、gmcp、telnet 等。
